summary: Phase 52 testing complete. All 22 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) Cloudinary signature endpoint accepts resource_type=raw|auto|image|video with admin/brand tokens, (2) Credit application accepts supporting_doc_url, (3) AM permission via parent_brand_id inheritance works correctly, (4) Account managers endpoint returns factories[] nested under brands with 'brand groups' capacity messaging, (5) Address book at checkout loads saved addresses and auto-picks default.
seed_data_creation: Test invoice created for Demo Factory A via parent AM inheritance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 52 features fully tested. Key findings: (1) FileUploadInput component with drag-drop working on Invoice/E-way/CN/DN/Payment forms, (2) BrandFileUpload component working in ApplyCreditModal with supporting_doc_url field, (3) AM permission inheritance via parent_brand_id verified - admin@locofast.com can access Demo Factory A (id: d55bb136-ae62-4744-96d6-44bf09d2d9c9) financials because they're assigned to parent Test Brand Co (id: 03b50566-e559-4a54-97f0-4cd1179615d4), (4) Account managers endpoint returns factories[] nested under each managed brand, (5) Brand cart loads addresses from /api/brand/addresses and auto-picks default address.

cloudinary_signature.details: Endpoint accepts resource_type=raw|auto|image|video, admin/brand tokens authorize correctly, unauthenticated requests rejected

credit_application_supporting_doc.details: POST /api/brand/credit-application accepts supporting_doc_url field, modal shows drag-drop upload widget

am_permission_via_parent.details: AM assigned to parent brand (Test Brand Co) can access factory (Demo Factory A) invoices/financials via parent_brand_id inheritance

grouped_am_picker.details: GET /api/admin/account-managers returns factories[] nested under each managed brand, capacity messaging shows 'brand groups'

address_book_at_checkout.details: Brand cart loads /api/brand/addresses, auto-picks default address, renders saved-address cards with selection radio

file_upload_widgets.details: Invoice PDF, E-way Bill PDF, CN/DN Note PDF, Payment Receipt PDF all use drag-drop FileUploadInput component
